label: About
title: About Canopy Score Memory Field
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 26 recent saved-signal files and 16 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around Inside America's Healthiest Yards: Edwina Von Gal's Iconic Hamptons Paradise (Garden Tour) and Image 1983-1998 (Skintone Edition), by Susumu Yokota, plus 7 more. A source image from f4.bcbits.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Canopy Score Memory Field: Square, image-led frontpage artwork: a dark charcoal field filled with huge cropped abstract graphic forms, almost typographic but never readable, surrounds a centered warm beige scrapbook-painting square. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against pale central paper inset, open crystal nest pod, and wrapped egg pod.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
